---
title: "T1D Adiposity scRNA NEBULA Results Report"
author: "Ye Ji Choi"
format:
  revealjs:
    embed-resources: true
    scrollable: true
    transition: slide
    controls-layout: bottom-right
    menu: true
    toc: true
    toc-depth: 3
    fontsize: 15
    number-sections: true
---

```{r include = F}
library(jsonlite)
library(aws.s3)
library(knitr)
library(dplyr)
library(kableExtra)
library(tidyverse)
library(fgsea)
```

```{r include = F}
user <- Sys.info()[["user"]]

if (user == "choiyej") {
  results_dir <- "/Users/choiyej/Library/CloudStorage/OneDrive-UW/Bjornstad/T1D Adiposity"
  keys <- fromJSON("/Users/choiyej/Library/CloudStorage/OneDrive-TheUniversityofColoradoDenver/Bjornstad Pyle Lab/keys.json")
} else if (user == "yejichoi") {
  results_dir <- "/mmfs1/gscratch/togo/yejichoi/T1D_Adiposity"
  keys <- fromJSON("/mmfs1/home/yejichoi/keys.json")
} else if (user == "pylell") {
  results_dir <- "/Users/pylell/Library/CloudStorage/OneDrive-SharedLibraries-UW/Bjornstad/T1D Adiposity"
  keys <- fromJSON("/mmfs1/home/pylell/keys.json")
} else {
  stop("Unknown user: please specify paths.")
}
```

```{r include = F}
Sys.setenv(
  "AWS_ACCESS_KEY_ID" = keys$MY_ACCESS_KEY,
  "AWS_SECRET_ACCESS_KEY" = keys$MY_SECRET_KEY,
  "AWS_DEFAULT_REGION" = "",
  "AWS_REGION" = "",
  "AWS_S3_ENDPOINT" = "s3.kopah.uw.edu"
)
```

```{r echo = F}
# Cell type groups matching the KPMP cell types used in the analysis
celltype_groups <- list(
  PT = c("PT-S1/S2", "PT-S3", "aPT"),
  `PT-S1/S2` = "PT-S1/S2",
  `PT-S3` = "PT-S3",
  aPT = "aPT",
  TAL = c("C-TAL-1", "C-TAL-2", "aTAL", "dTAL"),
  `C-TAL-1` = "C-TAL-1",
  `C-TAL-2` = "C-TAL-2",
  aTAL = "aTAL",
  dTAL = "dTAL",
  PC = c("CCD-PC", "CNT-PC", "dCCD-PC", "M-PC", "tPC-IC"),
  `CCD-PC` = "CCD-PC",
  `CNT-PC` = "CNT-PC",
  `dCCD-PC` = "dCCD-PC",
  `M-PC` = "M-PC",
  `tPC-IC` = "tPC-IC",
  IC = c("IC-A", "IC-B", "aIC"),
  `IC-A` = "IC-A",
  `IC-B` = "IC-B",
  aIC = "aIC",
  DTL_ATL = c("DTL", "aDTL", "ATL"),
  DTL = "DTL",
  aDTL = "aDTL",
  ATL = "ATL",
  DCT_CNT = c("DCT", "dDCT", "CNT"),
  DCT = "DCT",
  dDCT = "dDCT",
  CNT = "CNT",
  EC = c("EC-AVR", "EC-GC", "EC-PTC", "EC-AEA", "EC-LYM", "EC/VSMC", "EC-A"),
  `EC-AVR` = "EC-AVR",
  `EC-GC` = "EC-GC",
  `EC-PTC` = "EC-PTC",
  `EC-AEA` = "EC-AEA",
  `EC-LYM` = "EC-LYM",
  `EC/VSMC` = "EC/VSMC",
  `EC-A` = "EC-A",
  Immune_Myeloid = c("MAC", "MON", "cDC", "pDC"),
  MAC = "MAC",
  MON = "MON",
  cDC = "cDC",
  pDC = "pDC",
  Immune_Lymphoid = c("CD4+ T", "CD8+ T", "B", "NK", "cycT"),
  `CD4+ T` = "CD4+ T",
  `CD8+ T` = "CD8+ T",
  B = "B",
  NK = "NK",
  cycT = "cycT",
  VSMC_P_FIB = c("VSMC/P", "FIB"),
  `VSMC/P` = "VSMC/P",
  FIB = "FIB",
  POD = "POD",
  MC = "MC",
  PEC = "PEC",
  Schwann = "SchwannCells",
  Other = "non-specific"
)

kpmp_general <- c(
  "PT", "TAL", "PC", "IC", "EC", "Immune")
```

```{r echo = F}
# Folder mapping: display name -> analysis_type (matching run_nebula_single.R config names)
folders <- c(
  # --- Categorical: BMI within T1D (unadjusted) ---
  "T1D Normal vs Overweight (BMI)" = "T1D_normal_vs_overweight_bmi",
  "T1D Non-obese vs Obese (BMI)" = "T1D_nonobese_vs_obese_bmi",
  "T1D Normal vs Obese (BMI)" = "T1D_normal_vs_obese_bmi",
  "T1D Normal vs OW+Obese (BMI)" = "T1D_normal_vs_ow_obese_bmi",
  # --- Categorical: DXA within T1D (unadjusted) ---
  "T1D Normal vs Overweight (DXA)" = "T1D_normal_vs_overweight_dxa",
  "T1D Non-obese vs Obese (DXA)" = "T1D_nonobese_vs_obese_dxa",
  "T1D Normal vs Obese (DXA)" = "T1D_normal_vs_obese_dxa",
  "T1D Normal vs OW+Obese (DXA)" = "T1D_normal_vs_ow_obese_dxa",
  # --- Categorical: HC vs T1D (BMI, unadjusted) ---
  "HC vs T1D Normal (BMI)" = "HC_vs_T1D_normal_bmi",
  "HC vs T1D Overweight (BMI)" = "HC_vs_T1D_overweight_bmi",
  "HC vs T1D Obese (BMI)" = "HC_vs_T1D_obese_bmi",
  # --- Categorical: HC vs T1D (DXA, unadjusted) ---
  "HC vs T1D Normal (DXA)" = "HC_vs_T1D_normal_dxa",
  "HC vs T1D Overweight (DXA)" = "HC_vs_T1D_overweight_dxa",
  "HC vs T1D Obese (DXA)" = "HC_vs_T1D_obese_dxa",
  # --- Categorical: BMI within T1D (adjusted for age) ---
  "T1D Normal vs Overweight (BMI, adj age)" = "T1D_normal_vs_overweight_bmi_adj_age",
  "T1D Non-obese vs Obese (BMI, adj age)" = "T1D_nonobese_vs_obese_bmi_adj_age",
  "T1D Normal vs Obese (BMI, adj age)" = "T1D_normal_vs_obese_bmi_adj_age",
  "T1D Normal vs OW+Obese (BMI, adj age)" = "T1D_normal_vs_ow_obese_bmi_adj_age",
  # --- Categorical: DXA within T1D (adjusted for age) ---
  "T1D Normal vs Overweight (DXA, adj age)" = "T1D_normal_vs_overweight_dxa_adj_age",
  "T1D Non-obese vs Obese (DXA, adj age)" = "T1D_nonobese_vs_obese_dxa_adj_age",
  "T1D Normal vs Obese (DXA, adj age)" = "T1D_normal_vs_obese_dxa_adj_age",
  "T1D Normal vs OW+Obese (DXA, adj age)" = "T1D_normal_vs_ow_obese_dxa_adj_age",
  # --- Categorical: HC vs T1D (BMI, adjusted for age) ---
  "HC vs T1D Normal (BMI, adj age)" = "HC_vs_T1D_normal_bmi_adj_age",
  "HC vs T1D Overweight (BMI, adj age)" = "HC_vs_T1D_overweight_bmi_adj_age",
  "HC vs T1D Obese (BMI, adj age)" = "HC_vs_T1D_obese_bmi_adj_age",
  # --- Categorical: HC vs T1D (DXA, adjusted for age) ---
  "HC vs T1D Normal (DXA, adj age)" = "HC_vs_T1D_normal_dxa_adj_age",
  "HC vs T1D Overweight (DXA, adj age)" = "HC_vs_T1D_overweight_dxa_adj_age",
  "HC vs T1D Obese (DXA, adj age)" = "HC_vs_T1D_obese_dxa_adj_age",
  # --- Continuous: T1D only (unadjusted) ---
  "BMI (T1D)" = "cont_bmi_t1d",
  "DXA Body Fat (T1D)" = "cont_dexa_body_fat_t1d",
  "DXA Bone Mineral Density (T1D)" = "cont_dexa_bone_mineral_density_t1d",
  "DXA Fat kg (T1D)" = "cont_dexa_fat_kg_t1d",
  "DXA Lean Mass (T1D)" = "cont_dexa_lean_mass_t1d",
  "DXA Lean kg (T1D)" = "cont_dexa_lean_kg_t1d",
  "DXA A/G Ratio (T1D)" = "cont_dexa_ag_ratio_t1d",
  "DXA Est. VAT (T1D)" = "cont_dexa_est_vat_t1d",
  "DXA Trunk kg (T1D)" = "cont_dexa_trunk_kg_t1d",
  "DXA Trunk Mass (T1D)" = "cont_dexa_trunk_mass_t1d",
  # --- Continuous: All subjects (unadjusted) ---
  "BMI (All)" = "cont_bmi_all",
  "DXA Body Fat (All)" = "cont_dexa_body_fat_all",
  "DXA Bone Mineral Density (All)" = "cont_dexa_bone_mineral_density_all",
  "DXA Fat kg (All)" = "cont_dexa_fat_kg_all",
  "DXA Lean Mass (All)" = "cont_dexa_lean_mass_all",
  "DXA Lean kg (All)" = "cont_dexa_lean_kg_all",
  "DXA A/G Ratio (All)" = "cont_dexa_ag_ratio_all",
  "DXA Est. VAT (All)" = "cont_dexa_est_vat_all",
  "DXA Trunk kg (All)" = "cont_dexa_trunk_kg_all",
  "DXA Trunk Mass (All)" = "cont_dexa_trunk_mass_all",
  # --- Continuous: All subjects (adjusted for group) ---
  "BMI (All, adj group)" = "cont_bmi_all_adj_group",
  "DXA Body Fat (All, adj group)" = "cont_dexa_body_fat_all_adj_group",
  "DXA Bone Mineral Density (All, adj group)" = "cont_dexa_bone_mineral_density_all_adj_group",
  "DXA Fat kg (All, adj group)" = "cont_dexa_fat_kg_all_adj_group",
  "DXA Lean Mass (All, adj group)" = "cont_dexa_lean_mass_all_adj_group",
  "DXA Lean kg (All, adj group)" = "cont_dexa_lean_kg_all_adj_group",
  "DXA A/G Ratio (All, adj group)" = "cont_dexa_ag_ratio_all_adj_group",
  "DXA Est. VAT (All, adj group)" = "cont_dexa_est_vat_all_adj_group",
  "DXA Trunk kg (All, adj group)" = "cont_dexa_trunk_kg_all_adj_group",
  "DXA Trunk Mass (All, adj group)" = "cont_dexa_trunk_mass_all_adj_group",
  # --- Continuous: T1D only (adjusted for age) ---
  "BMI (T1D, adj age)" = "cont_bmi_t1d_adj_age",
  "DXA Body Fat (T1D, adj age)" = "cont_dexa_body_fat_t1d_adj_age",
  "DXA Bone Mineral Density (T1D, adj age)" = "cont_dexa_bone_mineral_density_t1d_adj_age",
  "DXA Fat kg (T1D, adj age)" = "cont_dexa_fat_kg_t1d_adj_age",
  "DXA Lean Mass (T1D, adj age)" = "cont_dexa_lean_mass_t1d_adj_age",
  "DXA Lean kg (T1D, adj age)" = "cont_dexa_lean_kg_t1d_adj_age",
  "DXA A/G Ratio (T1D, adj age)" = "cont_dexa_ag_ratio_t1d_adj_age",
  "DXA Est. VAT (T1D, adj age)" = "cont_dexa_est_vat_t1d_adj_age",
  "DXA Trunk kg (T1D, adj age)" = "cont_dexa_trunk_kg_t1d_adj_age",
  "DXA Trunk Mass (T1D, adj age)" = "cont_dexa_trunk_mass_t1d_adj_age",
  # --- Continuous: All subjects (adjusted for age) ---
  "BMI (All, adj age)" = "cont_bmi_all_adj_age",
  "DXA Body Fat (All, adj age)" = "cont_dexa_body_fat_all_adj_age",
  "DXA Bone Mineral Density (All, adj age)" = "cont_dexa_bone_mineral_density_all_adj_age",
  "DXA Fat kg (All, adj age)" = "cont_dexa_fat_kg_all_adj_age",
  "DXA Lean Mass (All, adj age)" = "cont_dexa_lean_mass_all_adj_age",
  "DXA Lean kg (All, adj age)" = "cont_dexa_lean_kg_all_adj_age",
  "DXA A/G Ratio (All, adj age)" = "cont_dexa_ag_ratio_all_adj_age",
  "DXA Est. VAT (All, adj age)" = "cont_dexa_est_vat_all_adj_age",
  "DXA Trunk kg (All, adj age)" = "cont_dexa_trunk_kg_all_adj_age",
  "DXA Trunk Mass (All, adj age)" = "cont_dexa_trunk_mass_all_adj_age",
  # --- Continuous: All subjects (adjusted for group + age) ---
  "BMI (All, adj group+age)" = "cont_bmi_all_adj_group_age",
  "DXA Body Fat (All, adj group+age)" = "cont_dexa_body_fat_all_adj_group_age",
  "DXA Bone Mineral Density (All, adj group+age)" = "cont_dexa_bone_mineral_density_all_adj_group_age",
  "DXA Fat kg (All, adj group+age)" = "cont_dexa_fat_kg_all_adj_group_age",
  "DXA Lean Mass (All, adj group+age)" = "cont_dexa_lean_mass_all_adj_group_age",
  "DXA Lean kg (All, adj group+age)" = "cont_dexa_lean_kg_all_adj_group_age",
  "DXA A/G Ratio (All, adj group+age)" = "cont_dexa_ag_ratio_all_adj_group_age",
  "DXA Est. VAT (All, adj group+age)" = "cont_dexa_est_vat_all_adj_group_age",
  "DXA Trunk kg (All, adj group+age)" = "cont_dexa_trunk_kg_all_adj_group_age",
  "DXA Trunk Mass (All, adj group+age)" = "cont_dexa_trunk_mass_all_adj_group_age",
  # --- Interaction: continuous * group ---
  "BMI x Group" = "interaction_bmi",
  "DXA Body Fat x Group" = "interaction_dexa_body_fat",
  "DXA Bone Mineral Density x Group" = "interaction_dexa_bone_mineral_density",
  "DXA Fat kg x Group" = "interaction_dexa_fat_kg",
  "DXA Lean Mass x Group" = "interaction_dexa_lean_mass",
  "DXA Lean kg x Group" = "interaction_dexa_lean_kg",
  "DXA A/G Ratio x Group" = "interaction_dexa_ag_ratio",
  "DXA Est. VAT x Group" = "interaction_dexa_est_vat",
  "DXA Trunk kg x Group" = "interaction_dexa_trunk_kg",
  "DXA Trunk Mass x Group" = "interaction_dexa_trunk_mass"
)

reverse_folders <- setNames(names(folders), folders)

meta_df_compiled <- tryCatch({
  tmp <- tempfile(fileext = ".csv")
  save_object(object = "results/nebula/csv/run_metadata_compiled.csv",
              bucket = "t1d.adiposity", region = "", file = tmp)
  df <- read.csv(tmp, stringsAsFactors = FALSE)
  unlink(tmp)
  df
}, error = function(e) {
  message("Could not load compiled metadata: ", e$message)
  data.frame()
})
```


# T1D adiposity state

## BMI
```{r}
transparent_theme <- theme(
  plot.background      = element_rect(fill = "transparent", color = NA),
  panel.background     = element_rect(fill = "transparent", color = NA),
  legend.background    = element_rect(fill = "transparent", color = NA),
  legend.box.background = element_rect(fill = "transparent", color = NA),
  legend.key           = element_rect(fill = "transparent", color = NA)
)
# for (cell in kpmp_general) {
for (cell in c("PT-S1/S2", "PT-S3", "aPT")) {  
  ct_hc_vs_t1d_normal <- s3readRDS(object = paste0("results/nebula/HC_vs_T1D_normal_bmi/", cell, "/", cell, 
                                                   "_nebula_hc_t1d_norm_bmi_processed.rds"),
          bucket = "t1d.adiposity",
          region = "") %>%
    select(Gene, 
           logFC.diab = `logFC_groupType 1 Diabetes`, 
           se.diab = `se_groupType 1 Diabetes`,
           pval.diab = `p_groupType 1 Diabetes`, 
           fdr.diab = fdr) %>%
    distinct(Gene, .keep_all = T)
  
  ct_t1d_ow_obese_vs_t1d_normal <- s3readRDS(object = paste0("results/nebula/T1D_normal_vs_ow_obese_bmi/", cell, "/", cell, 
                                                             "_nebula_t1d_norm_owob_bmi_processed.rds"),
          bucket = "t1d.adiposity",
          region = "") %>%
    select(Gene, 
           logFC.obese = logFC_bmi_ow_obese_binaryOverweight_Obese, 
           se.obese = se_bmi_ow_obese_binaryOverweight_Obese, 
           pval.obese = p_bmi_ow_obese_binaryOverweight_Obese, 
           fdr.obese = fdr) %>%
    distinct(Gene, .keep_all = T)
  
  cell = gsub("/", "_", cell)
  ct_combined <- merge(ct_hc_vs_t1d_normal, ct_t1d_ow_obese_vs_t1d_normal) %>%
    mutate(sig.obese = case_when(pval.obese < 0.05 & logFC.obese > 0 ~ "up", 
                                 pval.obese < 0.05 & logFC.obese < 0 ~ "down", 
                                 T ~ "ns"),
           sig.diab = case_when(pval.diab < 0.05 & logFC.diab > 0 ~ "up", 
                                pval.diab < 0.05 & logFC.diab < 0 ~ "down", 
                                T ~ "ns"),
           sig.joint = paste(sig.obese, sig.diab, sep = "_"),
           sig.joint_clean = case_when(sig.joint %in% c("up_up", "down_down") ~ "Amplified",
                                       sig.joint %in% c("up_down", "down_up") ~ "Reversed",
                                       sig.joint %in% c("down_ns", "up_ns") ~ "Adiposity-specific",
                                       sig.joint %in% c("ns_down", "ns_up") ~ "T1D-specific",
                                       T ~ "NS"))
  
  ct_combined$sig.joint_clean <- factor(ct_combined$sig.joint_clean,
                                        c("Amplified", "Reversed", "Adiposity-specific", "T1D-specific", "NS"))
  ct_sig <- ct_combined %>%
    filter(sig.joint_clean %in% c("Amplified", "Reversed"))
  
  ct_sig_concordant <- ct_combined %>%
    filter(sig.joint_clean %in% c("Adiposity-specific", "T1D-specific"))
  
  ct_combined %>%
    filter(sig.joint_clean == "NS") %>%
    ggplot(aes(x = logFC.diab, y = logFC.obese, color = sig.joint_clean)) +
    geom_hline(yintercept = 0, color = "grey", linetype = "dashed") +
    geom_vline(xintercept = 0, color = "grey", linetype = "dashed") +
    geom_point(alpha = 0.1, size = 1) +
    geom_point(data = ct_sig_concordant, alpha = 0.3, size = 2) +
    geom_point(data = ct_sig, alpha = 0.8, size = 3) +
    geom_label_repel(data = ct_sig, aes(label = Gene), max.overlaps = Inf) +
    scale_color_manual(values = c("Amplified" = "#f08080",
                                  "Reversed" = "#90be6d",
                                  "Adiposity-specific" = "#669bbc",
                                  "T1D-specific" = "#ffcb77",
                                  "NS" = "#e5e5e5")) +
    theme_minimal() +
    theme(text = element_text(size = 15),
          panel.grid = element_blank(),
          plot.title = element_text(size = 18, hjust = 0.5, face = "bold")) +
    labs(x = "logFC\nT1D NW vs. HC",
         y = "logFC\nT1D OB+OW vs. T1D NW",
         color = NULL,
         title = cell) +
    transparent_theme
  ggsave(file.path(root_path, paste0("T1D Adiposity/Results/Figures/Volcano Plots/contrasts/", cell, "_scatterplot_t1d_obow.png")),
         width = 7, height = 7, bg = "transparent")
  
  ct_combined %>%
    filter(sig.joint_clean != "NS") %>%
    ggplot(aes(x = sig.joint_clean, fill = sig.joint_clean)) +
    geom_bar() +
    scale_fill_manual(values = c("Amplified" = "#f08080",
                                 "Reversed" = "#90be6d",
                                 "Adiposity-specific" = "#669bbc",
                                 "T1D-specific" = "#ffcb77",
                                 "NS" = "#e5e5e5")) +
    theme_minimal() +
    theme(text = element_text(size = 15),
          panel.grid = element_blank(),
          plot.title = element_text(size = 18, hjust = 0.5, face = "bold"),
          legend.position = "none",
          axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 60, hjust = 1)) +
    labs(x = NULL, y = "Count") +
    transparent_theme
  
    ggsave(file.path(root_path, paste0("T1D Adiposity/Results/Figures/Volcano Plots/contrasts/", cell, "_bar_t1d_obow.png")),
         width = 5, height = 7, bg = "transparent")
    
    # GSEA
    pathways <- gmtPathways(file.path(root_path, "GSEA/6_h.all.v2025.1.Hs.symbols.gmt"))
    # Contrast A: T1D-NW vs HC
    ranks.diab <- with(ct_hc_vs_t1d_normal, logFC.diab / se.diab)
    names(ranks.diab) <- ct_hc_vs_t1d_normal$Gene
    ranks.diab <- sort(ranks.diab, decreasing = TRUE)
    ranks.diab <- ranks.diab[is.finite(ranks.diab)] 
    
    # Contrast B: T1D-OB vs T1D-NW
    ranks.obese <- with(ct_t1d_ow_obese_vs_t1d_normal, logFC.obese / se.obese)
    names(ranks.obese) <- ct_t1d_ow_obese_vs_t1d_normal$Gene
    ranks.obese <- sort(ranks.obese, decreasing = TRUE)
    ranks.obese <- ranks.obese[is.finite(ranks.obese)]
  
    fg.diab <- fgseaMultilevel(pathways = pathways, stats = ranks.diab,
                            minSize = 10, maxSize = 500, nPermSimple = 10000)
    fg.obese <- fgseaMultilevel(pathways = pathways, stats = ranks.obese,
                            minSize = 10, maxSize = 500, nPermSimple = 10000)
    
    fg <- inner_join(
      fg.diab %>% select(pathway, NES.diab = NES, padj.diab = padj, leA = leadingEdge),
      fg.obese %>% select(pathway, NES.obese = NES, padj.obese = padj, leB = leadingEdge),
      by = "pathway"
    ) %>%
      mutate(
        sig.diab = padj.diab < 0.05,
        sig.obese = padj.obese < 0.05,
        quadrant = case_when(
          sig.diab & sig.obese & NES.diab > 0 & NES.obese > 0 ~ "Amplified",
          sig.diab & sig.obese & NES.diab < 0 & NES.obese < 0 ~ "Amplified",
          sig.diab & sig.obese & NES.diab > 0 & NES.obese < 0 ~ "Reversed",
          sig.diab & sig.obese & NES.diab < 0 & NES.obese > 0 ~ "Reversed",
          sig.diab & !sig.obese ~ "T1D-specific",
          !sig.diab & sig.obese ~ "Adiposity-specific",
          TRUE ~ "NS"
        ),
        pathway = gsub("_", " ", 
                       gsub("HALLMARK_", "", pathway))
      )
    
    fg$quadrant <- factor(fg$quadrant,
                          c("Amplified", "Reversed", "Adiposity-specific", "T1D-specific", "NS"))
    
    ggplot(fg, aes(NES.diab, NES.obese, color = quadrant)) +
      geom_hline(yintercept = 0, color = "grey", linetype = "dashed") +
      geom_vline(xintercept = 0, color = "grey", linetype = "dashed") +
      geom_point(alpha = 0.8,
                 size = 3) +
      ggrepel::geom_label_repel(
        data = filter(fg, sig.diab & sig.obese),
        aes(label = pathway), max.overlaps = Inf
      ) +
    scale_color_manual(values = c("Amplified" = "#f08080",
                                 "Reversed" = "#90be6d",
                                 "Adiposity-specific" = "#669bbc",
                                 "T1D-specific" = "#ffcb77",
                                 "NS" = "#e5e5e5")) +
      labs(x = "NES\nT1D NW vs. HC",
           y = "NES\nT1D OB+OW vs. T1D NW",
           title = cell,
           color = NULL) +
      theme_minimal() +
      theme(text = element_text(size = 15),
            panel.grid = element_blank(),
            plot.title = element_text(size = 18, hjust = 0.5, face = "bold")) +
      transparent_theme
    
    ggsave(file.path(root_path, paste0("T1D Adiposity/Results/Figures/Volcano Plots/contrasts/", cell, "_hallmark_t1d_obow.png")),
         bg = "transparent")
    
}

```

## DXA
```{r}
for (cell in kpmp_general) {
# for (cell in c("PT-S1/S2", "PT-S3", "aPT")) {  
  ct_hc_vs_t1d_normal <- s3readRDS(object = paste0("results/nebula/HC_vs_T1D_normal_dxa/", cell, "/", cell, 
                                                   "_nebula_hc_t1d_norm_dxa_processed.rds"),
          bucket = "t1d.adiposity",
          region = "") %>%
    select(Gene, 
           logFC.diab = `logFC_groupType 1 Diabetes`, 
           se.diab = `se_groupType 1 Diabetes`,
           pval.diab = `p_groupType 1 Diabetes`, 
           fdr.diab = fdr) %>%
    distinct(Gene, .keep_all = T)
  
  ct_t1d_ow_obese_vs_t1d_normal <- s3readRDS(object = paste0("results/nebula/T1D_normal_vs_ow_obese_dxa/", cell, "/", cell, 
                                                             "_nebula_t1d_norm_owob_dxa_processed.rds"),
          bucket = "t1d.adiposity",
          region = "") %>%
    select(Gene, 
           logFC.obese = logFC_dxa_ow_obese_binaryOverweight_Obese, 
           se.obese = se_dxa_ow_obese_binaryOverweight_Obese, 
           pval.obese = p_dxa_ow_obese_binaryOverweight_Obese, 
           fdr.obese = fdr) %>%
    distinct(Gene, .keep_all = T)
  
  cell = gsub("/", "_", cell)
  ct_combined <- merge(ct_hc_vs_t1d_normal, ct_t1d_ow_obese_vs_t1d_normal) %>%
    mutate(sig.obese = case_when(pval.obese < 0.05 & logFC.obese > 0 ~ "up", 
                                 pval.obese < 0.05 & logFC.obese < 0 ~ "down", 
                                 T ~ "ns"),
           sig.diab = case_when(pval.diab < 0.05 & logFC.diab > 0 ~ "up", 
                                pval.diab < 0.05 & logFC.diab < 0 ~ "down", 
                                T ~ "ns"),
           sig.joint = paste(sig.obese, sig.diab, sep = "_"),
           sig.joint_clean = case_when(sig.joint %in% c("up_up", "down_down") ~ "Amplified",
                                       sig.joint %in% c("up_down", "down_up") ~ "Reversed",
                                       sig.joint %in% c("down_ns", "up_ns") ~ "Adiposity-specific",
                                       sig.joint %in% c("ns_down", "ns_up") ~ "T1D-specific",
                                       T ~ "NS"))
  
  ct_combined$sig.joint_clean <- factor(ct_combined$sig.joint_clean,
                                        c("Amplified", "Reversed", "Adiposity-specific", "T1D-specific", "NS"))
  ct_sig <- ct_combined %>%
    filter(sig.joint_clean %in% c("Amplified", "Reversed"))
  
  ct_sig_concordant <- ct_combined %>%
    filter(sig.joint_clean %in% c("Adiposity-specific", "T1D-specific"))
  
  ct_combined %>%
    filter(sig.joint_clean == "NS") %>%
    ggplot(aes(x = logFC.diab, y = logFC.obese, color = sig.joint_clean)) +
    geom_hline(yintercept = 0, color = "grey", linetype = "dashed") +
    geom_vline(xintercept = 0, color = "grey", linetype = "dashed") +
    geom_point(alpha = 0.1, size = 1) +
    geom_point(data = ct_sig_concordant, alpha = 0.3, size = 2) +
    geom_point(data = ct_sig, alpha = 0.8, size = 3) +
    geom_label_repel(data = ct_sig, aes(label = Gene), max.overlaps = Inf) +
    scale_color_manual(values = c("Amplified" = "#f08080",
                                  "Reversed" = "#90be6d",
                                  "Adiposity-specific" = "#669bbc",
                                  "T1D-specific" = "#ffcb77",
                                  "NS" = "#e5e5e5")) +
    theme_minimal() +
    theme(text = element_text(size = 15),
          panel.grid = element_blank(),
          plot.title = element_text(size = 18, hjust = 0.5, face = "bold")) +
    labs(x = "logFC\nT1D NW vs. HC",
         y = "logFC\nT1D OB+OW vs. T1D NW",
         color = NULL,
         title = cell) +
    transparent_theme
  ggsave(file.path(root_path, paste0("T1D Adiposity/Results/Figures/Volcano Plots/contrasts/", cell, "_scatterplot_t1d_obow_dxa.png")),
         width = 7, height = 7, bg = "transparent")
  
  ct_combined %>%
    filter(sig.joint_clean != "NS") %>%
    ggplot(aes(x = sig.joint_clean, fill = sig.joint_clean)) +
    geom_bar() +
    scale_fill_manual(values = c("Amplified" = "#f08080",
                                 "Reversed" = "#90be6d",
                                 "Adiposity-specific" = "#669bbc",
                                 "T1D-specific" = "#ffcb77",
                                 "NS" = "#e5e5e5")) +
    theme_minimal() +
    theme(text = element_text(size = 15),
          panel.grid = element_blank(),
          plot.title = element_text(size = 18, hjust = 0.5, face = "bold"),
          legend.position = "none",
          axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 60, hjust = 1)) +
    labs(x = NULL, y = "Count") +
    transparent_theme
  
    ggsave(file.path(root_path, paste0("T1D Adiposity/Results/Figures/Volcano Plots/contrasts/", cell, "_bar_t1d_obow_dxa.png")),
         width = 5, height = 7, bg = "transparent")
    
    # GSEA
    pathways <- gmtPathways(file.path(root_path, "GSEA/6_h.all.v2025.1.Hs.symbols.gmt"))
    # Contrast A: T1D-NW vs HC
    ranks.diab <- with(ct_hc_vs_t1d_normal, logFC.diab / se.diab)
    names(ranks.diab) <- ct_hc_vs_t1d_normal$Gene
    ranks.diab <- sort(ranks.diab, decreasing = TRUE)
    ranks.diab <- ranks.diab[is.finite(ranks.diab)] 
    
    # Contrast B: T1D-OB vs T1D-NW
    ranks.obese <- with(ct_t1d_ow_obese_vs_t1d_normal, logFC.obese / se.obese)
    names(ranks.obese) <- ct_t1d_ow_obese_vs_t1d_normal$Gene
    ranks.obese <- sort(ranks.obese, decreasing = TRUE)
    ranks.obese <- ranks.obese[is.finite(ranks.obese)]
  
    fg.diab <- fgseaMultilevel(pathways = pathways, stats = ranks.diab,
                            minSize = 10, maxSize = 500, nPermSimple = 10000)
    fg.obese <- fgseaMultilevel(pathways = pathways, stats = ranks.obese,
                            minSize = 10, maxSize = 500, nPermSimple = 10000)
    
    fg <- inner_join(
      fg.diab %>% select(pathway, NES.diab = NES, padj.diab = padj, leA = leadingEdge),
      fg.obese %>% select(pathway, NES.obese = NES, padj.obese = padj, leB = leadingEdge),
      by = "pathway"
    ) %>%
      mutate(
        sig.diab = padj.diab < 0.05,
        sig.obese = padj.obese < 0.05,
        quadrant = case_when(
          sig.diab & sig.obese & NES.diab > 0 & NES.obese > 0 ~ "Amplified",
          sig.diab & sig.obese & NES.diab < 0 & NES.obese < 0 ~ "Amplified",
          sig.diab & sig.obese & NES.diab > 0 & NES.obese < 0 ~ "Reversed",
          sig.diab & sig.obese & NES.diab < 0 & NES.obese > 0 ~ "Reversed",
          sig.diab & !sig.obese ~ "T1D-specific",
          !sig.diab & sig.obese ~ "Adiposity-specific",
          TRUE ~ "NS"
        ),
        pathway = gsub("_", " ", 
                       gsub("HALLMARK_", "", pathway))
      )
    
    fg$quadrant <- factor(fg$quadrant,
                          c("Amplified", "Reversed", "Adiposity-specific", "T1D-specific", "NS"))
    
    ggplot(fg, aes(NES.diab, NES.obese, color = quadrant)) +
      geom_hline(yintercept = 0, color = "grey", linetype = "dashed") +
      geom_vline(xintercept = 0, color = "grey", linetype = "dashed") +
      geom_point(alpha = 0.8,
                 size = 3) +
      ggrepel::geom_label_repel(
        data = filter(fg, sig.diab & sig.obese),
        aes(label = pathway), max.overlaps = Inf
      ) +
    scale_color_manual(values = c("Amplified" = "#f08080",
                                 "Reversed" = "#90be6d",
                                 "Adiposity-specific" = "#669bbc",
                                 "T1D-specific" = "#ffcb77",
                                 "NS" = "#e5e5e5")) +
      labs(x = "NES\nT1D NW vs. HC",
           y = "NES\nT1D OB+OW vs. T1D NW",
           title = cell,
           color = NULL) +
      theme_minimal() +
      theme(text = element_text(size = 15),
            panel.grid = element_blank(),
            plot.title = element_text(size = 18, hjust = 0.5, face = "bold")) +
      transparent_theme
    
    ggsave(file.path(root_path, paste0("T1D Adiposity/Results/Figures/Volcano Plots/contrasts/", cell, "_hallmark_t1d_obow_dxa.png")),
         bg = "transparent")
    
}

```
